prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津综合类最低录取位次分别为约1299名、343名、552名、1031名。2021至2022年位次大幅前移（从1299升至343），2024年回 落至552，2025年进一步后移至1031，近两年呈持续后移趋势，2025年基准位次约1031名；该校在天津综合类招生计划：2021年13人、2022年15人、2024年22人 、2025年24人，呈逐年扩招态势；2026年计划24人，与2025年持平，扩招趋势暂停，竞争压力未因计划增加而缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 上海交通大学为985工程、211工 程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜排名第4位（2026年），属全国顶尖高校层次；医学院作为交大核心组成部分，临床医学、口腔医学均为A+学科，整体实力稳居国内医学 院校第一梯队；2026年高考周期内上海交通大学声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端（撤稿量较高）及校园安全事件，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第42位（较热），短视频平台关注度中等；历史投档异常方面，2021年曾出现河南理科投档线华五倒数第一的记录，但近年未见明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中，临床医学获评A+、口腔医学获评A+、生物学获评A+，招生专业以临床医学（八年制本博连读、五年制）、口腔医学（5+3一体化）为主，与A+学科高度匹配， 学科优势突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，临床医学为高热推荐，口腔医学为推荐，医学类专业整体报考热度持续高位；天津2026年高考总考生约82000人，较2025年71938人增长约14%，竞争显著加剧。综合历年位次近两年持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平（扩招暂停）、天津考生总数大幅增加约14%带来的竞争加剧，以及医学类专业持续高热的社会 需求，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准1031名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约1061名，区间934–1188名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读，法语班）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读，口腔方向）
- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）
- 医学试验班（临床医学五年制，眼视光方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学试验班（临床方向，临床医学五年制）
- 临床医学（五年制，英语班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 上海交通大学医学院在天津综合类招生专业均为临床医学与口腔医学方向，学科评估均为A+顶尖水平，社会热度持续高热。位次在预测区间934–1188名内，建议以二档（口腔医 学5+3、眼视光方向）为主力填报，一档（八年制本博连读各方向）作为冲刺，三档（五年制临床医学）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<934名）可重点冲击一档八年制 本博连读项目。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Tianjin Comprehensive category were approximately 1299, 343, 552, and 1031 respectively. Rankings moved significantly forward from 2021 to 2022 (from 1299 to 343), fell back to 552 in 2024, and further shifted to 1031 in 2025, showing a continuous backward trend in the last two years, with a baseline ranking of about 1031 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Tianjin Comprehensive category: 13 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 22 in 2024, and 24 in 2025, showing a gradual expansion. The 2026 plan is 24, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend, and competitive pressure has not eased due to the increase in plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shanghai Jiao Tong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, ranking 4th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, belonging to the top tier of national universities. As a core component of SJTU, the School of Medicine has A+ disciplines in Clinical Medicine and Stomatology, with overall strength firmly in the first echelon of domestic medical schools. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, SJTU's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (high retraction volume) and campus safety incidents, which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 42nd (relatively hot), with moderate attention on short video platforms. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2021 there was a record of the lowest admission score among the Huawu Five in Henan Science category, but no obvious gap signals have been seen in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Clinical Medicine was rated A+, Stomatology A+, and Biology A+. The enrollment majors are mainly Clinical Medicine (eight-year MD program, five-year program) and Stomatology (5+3 integrated program), highly matching the A+ disciplines, with prominent disciplinary advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity analysis shows Clinical Medicine as a high-heat recommendation, Stomatology as recommended, and the overall application heat for medical majors remains high. In 2026, the total number of examinees in Tianjin is about 82,000, an increase of about 14% from 71,938 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings in the last two years, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025 (expansion paused), the intensified competition due to a 14% increase in Tianjin examinees, and the sustained high social demand for medical majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 1031. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1061, with a range of 934–1188.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year MD Program, French Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year MD Program, Stomatology Direction)
- Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year MD Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Medicine Five-Year Program, Ophthalmology and Optometry Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Direction, Clinical Medicine Five-Year Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program, English Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Shanghai Jiao Tong University School of Medicine's enrollment majors in Tianjin Comprehensive category are all in Clinical Medicine and Stomatology directions, with discipline evaluations at the top A+ level and sustained high social heat. For rankings within the predicted range of 934–1188, it is recommended to primarily fill Tier 2 (Stomatology 5+3, Ophthalmology and Optometry direction) as the main choice, Tier 1 (Eight-Year MD Program directions) as a reach, and Tier 3 (Five-Year Clinical Medicine) as a safe backup. Rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<934) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 Eight-Year MD programs.
